quote: Iran must make a deal, before there is nothing left, and save what was once known as the Iranian Empire.
summary: Trump's first post the morning after Israel's overnight 'Operation Rising Lion' strikes — pressing Iran to deal and warning it 'will only get worse.'

quote: IRAN CAN NOT HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON. I said it over and over again! Everyone should immediately evacuate Tehran!
summary: From the G7 summit, Trump warned Tehran to evacuate — then left the summit a day early.
Minutes after claiming 'complete and total control of the skies over Iran,' Trump demanded capitulation in a two-word post.

quote: I may do it, I may not do it. Nobody knows what I'm going to do.
summary: Asked whether the U.S. would strike Iran's nuclear sites, Trump kept it deliberately ambiguous — spoken to reporters, not posted.

quote: I will make my decision whether or not to go within the next two weeks.
summary: A statement from Trump, read by the press secretary, signaling a ~two-week window — markets were closed for Juneteenth.

quote: We have completed our very successful attack on the three Nuclear sites in Iran, including Fordow, Natanz, and Esfahan. … NOW IS THE TIME FOR PEACE!
summary: Trump announced completed U.S. airstrikes ('Operation Midnight Hammer') on Iran's three main nuclear sites.

quote: EVERYONE, KEEP OIL PRICES DOWN. I’M WATCHING! YOU’RE PLAYING RIGHT INTO THE HANDS OF THE ENEMY. DON’T DO IT!
summary: Two minutes later he told the Dept. of Energy: 'DRILL, BABY, DRILL!!! And I mean NOW!!!' Markets feared a Strait of Hormuz oil shock.

source: Event — Iranian strike on Al-Udeid Air Base, Qatar
summary: Iran's telegraphed, casualty-free retaliation: missiles were largely intercepted with advance warning, sparing oil infrastructure — and oil promptly collapsed.

quote: CONGRATULATIONS TO EVERYONE! … there will be a Complete and Total CEASEFIRE … an Official END to THE 12 DAY WAR will be saluted by the World.
summary: Trump unilaterally announced a phased Israel–Iran ceasefire, branding the conflict 'THE 12 DAY WAR.'

quote: We basically have two countries that have been fighting so long and so hard that they don't know what the f*** they're doing.
summary: Trump vented that both sides appeared to be violating his ceasefire, before leaving for the NATO summit.
